problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: Combining Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
